rationale.root_cause: The model provided no response, so it did not identify the use-after-free at the printLine(data) after free(data) around line 34. No mechanism was explained.
rationale.local_fix: No fix was proposed to avoid using the buffer after it was freed (e.g., moving print before free or deferring free).
rationale.global_fix: No global/ownership-lifetime solution (e.g., RAII or explicit ownership) was suggested.
